summary: Clear audience-sourced recording of a solid two‑set show.
review: The front‑of‑house (FOB) capture using the Neumann KM86 Sirmick pull is described as clear and pleasant, making the listening experience enjoyable. Reviewers also note that the concert itself was a good one with two solid sets, though no specific songs are singled out. Overall it’s a decent performance captured with respectable audio quality.

ai_rating.rationale: Only a single review; the reviewer gave 4 stars, praising both the sound clarity and the solid two‑set performance.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Neumann KM86 Sirmick pull noted as sounding good and a touch clearer than other audience sources.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Two solid sets with consistent energy, no major issues mentioned.
